title: 6 2-Step Security Token Troubleshooting
body_text:
6	2-Step Security Token Troubleshooting
6.1	2-Step Security Token Troubleshooting
If a user is having trouble logging in with their 2-step security token, confirm the following:
They are using the 2-step security token thatâs assigned to their user profile.
Note:	 If they have multiple profiles, the 2-step security token applies only to the profile it was set up on. Soft tokens arenât interchangeable between profiles.
Theyâre reusing a code used during a failed login attempt. Instruct them to wait for their token to refresh, then try again.
If the user is assigned a hard token, compare the serial number on the back of the token to the serial number listed in their 2-step security summary in User Management to confirm they match. See the User Management Part for more information.
END
